post.subject: Golden Touch
post.body: Played Pool, got slightly drunk and watched Donnie Darko. That was My Friday. Its 3:35am and im sitting at the flat listening to the compilation CD that i made last week and left here. Listening to Razorlight - Golden Touch. Its such a great song!! Right now im listening to it for the second time in a row. It is amazing. I dont know what it is about this song... but i truely love it. Unfortuantely i wont be able to go to Donegal this weekend. I feel i will be missing out on those times together. I want to go things together, you are one of my best friends and i want to spend a lot of time together but dont get the chance to enough. It just aint fair... i gotta go to bed now cos im working tomorrow. Im going to give my newly written CV to a few shops tomorrow in the hope of getting another job cos ive had enough of only working 12 fucking hours a week - i want more money so that i can can really enjoy myself. Enough said - time for sleep "I know a girl with a golden touch..."
